title: Sparkling Blue & Pink Mr. & Mrs. Prism Banner (3.6 Meters) 1 Piece - Elegant Celebration Decor for Weddings & Events
features: MR. & MRS. BANNER: Add a touch of glamour to your wedding or event with our sparkling blue & pink Mr. & Mrs. prism banner, designed to create a stunning visual centerpiece for your celebration.

VIBRANT & SPARKLING COLORS: Featuring a dazzling blue and pink color combination, our elegant celebration decor effortlessly complements any wedding or event theme, making it a versatile choice for your special day.

IMPRESSIVE LENGTH: Measuring an impressive 3.6 meters, the eye-catching sparkling blue & pink Mr. & Mrs. prism banner easily spans a wide range of decorative spaces, adding a captivating focal point to your festivities.

EFFORTLESS SETUP: Simply hang the single-piece, pre-assembled banner in minutes, ensuring a quick and hassle-free installation that allows you to focus on what truly matters: celebrating your special day with loved ones.

PREFECT FOR WEDDING EVENTS: With its striking appearance and easy setup, the sparkling Mr. & Mrs. prism banner makes an impeccable decorative addition to weddings, engagement parties, anniversaries, bridal showers, and other celebratory events.
description: Product Description Make your wedding party more glamorous by putting up our eye-catching Prismatic Foil "Mr. & Mrs." Banner. 1 Banner - 12 ft. This prismatic foil banner features a black script "Mr. & Mrs." headline and heart prints on a holographic background. This prismatic banner is perfect for celebrating weddings and anniversaries. Made of durable foil material, this prismatic banner is very eye catching with high quality prints. This product is easy to assemble, install, and can be stored and re-used. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1 x Banner See more
